steps.title: Follow the timeline
steps.content: The passage moves from Clara Ellsworth's advocacy at Vassar in 1905 to her national prominence in 1913. The transition must show a later outcome after a period of work.

steps.title: Choose the culmination
steps.content: Choice A suggests an immediate logical result, Choice C would introduce an example, and Choice D would signal similarity. The needed transition shows that her advocacy eventually led to the 1913 moment. The answer is B.
